mapper.select: SELECT menu_id, sys_se_cd, menu_nm, upper_menu_id, menu_ord, prgrm_id, icon_nm, use_bgng_dt, use_end_dt, frst_reg_dt, frst_reg_user_id, last_chg_dt, last_chg_user_id FROM com.tn_sys_menu WHERE menu_id = #{menuId} AND NOW() BETWEEN use_bgng_dt AND use_end_dt
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM com.tn_sys_menu WHERE upper_menu_id = #{menuId} AND NOW() BETWEEN use_bgng_dt AND use_end_dt
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO com.tn_sys_menu (menu_id, sys_se_cd, menu_nm, upper_menu_id, menu_ord, prgrm_id, icon_nm, use_bgng_dt, use_end_dt, frst_reg_dt, frst_reg_user_id, last_chg_dt, last_chg_user_id) VALUES (#{menuId}, #{sysSeCd}, #{menuNm}, #{upperMenuId}, #{menuOrd}, #{prgrmId}, #{iconNm}, NOW(), '9999-12-31 23:59:59', NOW(), #{frstRegUserId}, NOW(), #{lastChgUserId})
mapper.update: UPDATE com.tn_sys_menu SET sys_se_cd = #{sysSeCd}, menu_nm = #{menuNm}, upper_menu_id = #{upperMenuId}, menu_ord = #{menuOrd}, prgrm_id = #{prgrmId}, icon_nm = #{iconNm}, last_chg_dt = NOW(), last_chg_user_id = #{lastChgUserId} WHERE menu_id = #{menuId} AND NOW() BETWEEN use_bgng_dt AND use_end_dt
